0.original: Case number one. 2 00:00:01,600 --> 00:00:04,610 Why G.N. hasn't married. 3 00:00:05,201 --> 00:00:10,850 Mr. G.N. is now in his late thirties, is well-educated, works as an accountant, 4 00:00:10,880 --> 00:00:12,850 and lives alone in Chicago. 5 00:00:13,201 --> 00:00:15,891 G.N.'s big desire is to get married. 6 00:00:16,081 --> 00:00:20,850 He wants love, companionship, a home, children, the works. 7 00:00:21,201 --> 00:00:23,490 G.N. has been close to marriage. 8 00:00:23,600 --> 00:00:26,131 Once he was only one day away. 9 00:00:26,240 --> 00:00:32,450 But each time he has been near marriage, he discovers something wrong with the girl he's about to marry. 10 00:00:32,721 --> 00:00:36,050 Just in time before I made an awful mistake. 11 00:00:36,560 --> 00:00:38,610 One instance stands out. 12 00:00:38,800 --> 00:00:43,730 Two years ago, Jian thought he finally had met just the right girl. 13 00:00:43,920 --> 00:00:46,771 She was attractive, pleasant, intelligent. 14 00:00:46,961 --> 00:00:51,571 But Jian had to be absolutely sure that marriage was the right thing. 15 00:00:51,841 --> 00:00:59,410 As they were discussing marriage plans one evening, the future Mrs. Jian made a few remarks that bothered Jian. 16 00:00:59,920 --> 00:01:09,971 So, to make certain he was marrying the right girl, G.N. drew up a four-page document of stipulations she was to agree to before they got married. 17 00:01:10,321 --> 00:01:17,170 The document, neatly typed and looking very legal, covered every segment of living G.N. could think of. 18 00:01:17,521 --> 00:01:22,931 There was one section on religion, what church they would go to, how often they would attend, 19 00:01:23,040 --> 00:01:24,610 how much they would donate. 20 00:01:24,881 --> 00:01:28,610 Another section covered children, how many and when. 21 00:01:29,600 --> 00:01:36,371 In detail, G.N. outlined the kind of friends they would have, his future wife's employment status, 22 00:01:36,401 --> 00:01:39,651 where they would live, how their income would be spent. 23 00:01:40,000 --> 00:01:48,131 To finish the document, G.N. devoted half a page to listing specific habits the girl must break or must acquire. 24 00:01:48,480 --> 00:01:53,971 This covered such habits as smoking, drinking, makeup, entertainment, and so on. 25 00:01:54,800 --> 00:02:00,610 When Jian's prospective bride reviewed his ultimatum, she did what you would expect. 26 00:02:00,800 --> 00:02:06,531 She sent it back with a note saying, the usual marriage clause, for better or for worse, 27 00:02:06,641 --> 00:02:10,290 is good enough for everyone else, and it's good enough for me. 28 00:02:10,480 --> 00:02:12,371 The whole thing is off. 29 00:02:13,281 --> 00:02:20,771 As Jian was relating his experience to me, he said worriedly, now what was so wrong in writing out this agreement? 30 00:02:20,800 --> 00:02:23,251 After all, marriage is a big step. 31 00:02:23,281 --> 00:02:25,011 You can't be too careful. 32 00:02:25,680 --> 00:02:27,331 But Jian was wrong. 33 00:02:27,440 --> 00:02:30,211 You can be too careful, too cautious. 34 00:02:30,321 --> 00:02:35,891 Not only in planning a marriage, but in planning anything in the world where things get done. 35 00:02:36,240 --> 00:02:38,371 The standards can be too high. 36 00:02:38,480 --> 00:02:45,971 Jian's approach to marriage was very much like his approach to his work, his savings, his friendships, everything else. 37 00:02:46,800 --> 00:02:53,490 The test of a successful person is not an ability to eliminate all problems before they arise, 38 00:02:53,600 --> 00:02:57,410 but to meet and work out difficulties when they do arise. 39 00:02:57,761 --> 00:03:05,091 We must be willing to make an intelligent compromise with perfection, lest we wait forever before taking action. 40 00:03:05,281 --> 00:03:09,410 It's still good advice to cross bridges as we come to them. 41 00:03:10,401 --> 00:03:11,730 Case number two.
0.b1: Case number one. Why G.N. hasn't married. Mr. G.N. is in his late thirties, is well-educated, works as an accountant, and lives alone in Chicago. G.N. really wants to get married. He wants love, a partner, a home, and children. G.N. has been close to marriage before. Once, he was only one day away. But every time he gets close, he finds something wrong with the girl. He thinks he avoids a big mistake just in time. One story is special. Two years ago, Jian thought he met the right girl. She was attractive, kind, and smart. But Jian needed to be 100% sure about the marriage. One evening, while talking about their plans, she said things that worried him. To be sure, G.N. wrote a four-page document of rules she had to agree to before marriage. The document looked very official and covered every part of life. One section was about religion, which church to attend, and how much money to donate. Another section was about children, how many and when. G.N. wrote in detail about their future friends, her job, where to live, and how to spend money. Finally, he added half a page of habits she had to change or learn. This included smoking, drinking, makeup, and hobbies. When his girlfriend saw his list, she did what you would expect. She sent it back with a note saying that the traditional marriage promise, 'for better or for worse,' is good enough for everyone else and is good enough for her. The wedding was cancelled. When Jian told me this, he asked worriedly, 'What was wrong with writing an agreement? Marriage is a big step. You cannot be too careful.' But Jian was wrong. You can be too careful and too cautious. This is true for marriage and for everything else in life. Your standards can be too high. Jian treated marriage like his work or his savings—he wanted everything perfect. A successful person is not someone who avoids all problems, but someone who can solve problems when they happen. We must be willing to accept that things are not perfect, or we will never do anything. It is good advice to deal with problems only when they actually happen. Case number two.
0.cn: 案例一。为什么G.N.还没结婚。G.N.先生现在三十多岁，受过良好教育，是一名会计，独自住在芝加哥。G.N.非常渴望结婚。他想要爱情、伴侣、家庭、孩子，想要这一切。G.N.曾离婚姻很近。有一次，他距离结婚只差一天。但每次快要结婚时，他都会发现对方身上有什么不对劲。他觉得自己在犯下大错前及时止损了。有一个例子很典型。两年前，Jian以为他终于遇到了对的人。她很有魅力，讨人喜欢，也很聪明。但Jian必须百分之百确定婚姻是正确的选择。一天晚上，当他们讨论结婚计划时，未来的Jian太太说了一些让Jian感到困扰的话。于是，为了确保他娶的是对的人，G.N.起草了一份四页纸的文件，要求她在婚前同意这些条款。这份文件打印得整整齐齐，看起来非常正式，涵盖了G.N.能想到的生活的方方面面。其中一部分关于宗教，包括去哪家教堂、多久去一次、捐多少钱。另一部分关于孩子，包括要几个、什么时候要。G.N.详细列出了他们会交什么样的朋友、未来妻子的工作状态、他们住哪里、收入如何支配。为了完成这份文件，G.N.用了半页纸列出女方必须改掉或养成的具体习惯。这包括吸烟、饮酒、化妆、娱乐等等。当Jian的未婚妻看到他的最后通牒时，她做了你意料之中的事。她把文件退了回来，并附上一张纸条说，通常的结婚誓词“无论好坏”对别人来说已经足够好了，对我来说也足够了。一切都结束了。当Jian向我讲述他的经历时，他忧心忡忡地问，写下这份协议有什么错吗？毕竟，婚姻是人生大事。怎么小心都不为过。但Jian错了。你确实可能过于小心、过于谨慎。这不仅适用于规划婚姻，也适用于世界上任何需要完成的事情。标准可能会定得太高。Jian对待婚姻的方式和他对待工作、储蓄、友谊以及其他一切事情的方式非常相似。衡量一个成功人士的标准，不是在问题出现前消除所有问题的能力，而是在问题出现时去面对并解决它们。我们必须愿意在完美面前做出明智的妥协，否则我们就会在采取行动前永远等待。走一步看一步，这依然是很好的建议。案例二。
0.ai_notes:
'the works': everything that is expected or typical in a certain situation.
'stands out': is very noticeable or easy to see.
'stipulations': specific requirements or conditions that must be met.
'ultimatum': a final demand or statement of terms, where the rejection will result in a breakdown of relations.
'for better or for worse': a traditional phrase from wedding vows meaning the couple will stay together regardless of future difficulties.
'the whole thing is off': an informal way to say that an event, plan, or relationship has been cancelled.
'you can’t be too careful': a common expression meaning it is impossible to be too cautious, though the text argues the opposite.
'lest': a formal word meaning 'to avoid the risk of' or 'in case'.
'cross bridges as we come to them': an idiom meaning to deal with problems only when they actually happen, rather than worrying about them in advance.
0.remarks:
'the works': 在特定情况下被预期或典型的所有事物。
'stands out': 非常显眼，容易被注意到。
'stipulations': 必须满足的具体要求或条件。
'ultimatum': 最后通牒，即拒绝后会导致关系破裂的最终要求或条款。
'for better or for worse': 源自婚礼誓词的传统短语，意为无论未来有何困难，双方都将在一起。
'the whole thing is off': 非正式表达，意为活动、计划或关系已被取消。
'you can’t be too careful': 常用表达，意为再谨慎也不为过，尽管文中持相反观点。
'lest': 正式用词，意为“以免”或“唯恐”。
'cross bridges as we come to them': 习语，意为问题真正发生时再去处理，而不是提前担心。
